name: Fennel Risotto with Pistachios
recipeIngredient: 1 medium Red bell pepper, coarsely chopped
Freshly ground black pepper, to taste
recipeInstructions:
1. Heat the broth-water combination over medium-low heat. Keep warm.
2. In a large skillet, preferably nonstick, or large pot, heat the butter and oil over medium heat until hot. Add the onion, fennel, and red pepper; sauté 5 minutes. Add the garlic and sauté an additional minute.
3. Stir in the rice and cook, stirring 2 minutes. Slowly start to add the liquid, about a ladleful at a time. Cook, covered, over medium-low heat, 10 minutes, stirring occasionally. Add the liquid slowly and stir often. Wait until the liquid has been absorbed each time before adding the next ladleful. Repeat the cooking process, covered, for another 10 minutes.
4. Uncover and continue adding the liquid and stirring often. The risotto should cook about 30 minutes. The finished risotto should be creamy, with a little chewiness at the center of the rice.
5. Add the pistachios, pepper, and Parmesan to the finished risotto, stirring until blended.
